channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kansas remains No. 1 in AP poll, top 10 shuffled with losses by 3 teams; Wisconsin joins rankings
item.description: Kansas strengthened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25. The rest of the top 10 turned into a jumble of teams swapping places. The Jayhawks picked up five first-place votes in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released on Monday, receiving 49 from a 61-person media panel. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants to bench Daniel Jones for Week 12: reports
item.description: New York Giants quarterback Daniel Jones will move to QB2 for Week 12 against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, according to multiple reports on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff shares 1 creative angle that failed to take off
item.description: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff explained to Fox News Digital one storyline that didn't get clearance to take off when he was with World Championship Wrestling.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Josh Allen seals Bills' 30-21 win over Chiefs with TD run, ending bid for perfect season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — After watching quarterback Josh Allen bounce off two Kansas City Chiefs defenders before crossing the goal line on a 26-yard run, Bills receiver Khalil Shakir joined the rest of the packed Buffalo stadium by screaming at the top of his lungs.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chargers beat Bengals 34-27 on Dobbins' late TD after squandering 21-point lead
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Jim Harbaugh and the Los Angeles Chargers finally have their signature win. Even if it ended up being a white-knuckle finish. The Chargers squandered a 21-point third-quarter lead Sunday night against the Cincinnati Bengals before J.K.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Dallas Wings win the WNBA draft lottery, earning the No. 1 pick next year
item.description: The future of the Dallas Wings got a lot brighter as the franchise won the WNBA draft lottery on Sunday and with it the chance to draft UConn star Paige Bueckers with the No. 1 pick. “We know what No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers fall after late TD pushes Seahawks past San Francisco 20-17
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Geno Smith scored on a 13-yard scramble with 12 seconds remaining and the Seattle Seahawks snapped a six-game losing streak against the San Francisco 49ers with a 20-17 victory on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Randle hits 3 at the buzzer to lift Timberwolves over Booker, Suns with 120-117 win
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Julius Randle hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer to cap his 35-point night and lift the Minnesota Timberwolves to a 120-117 win over the Phoenix Suns on Sunday afternoon. Randle and the Wolves got the ball back with just 2.1 seconds remaining and called a timeout to advance the ball.
item.dc:creator: TYLER MASON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-MLB star Jonathan Lucroy calls for voter ID requirement in elections
item.description: Former MLB star Jonathan Lucroy called for an identification requirement to be able to vote in elections. He had a discussion on social media about it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Andrei Vasilevskiy makes 29 saves for 36th NHL shutout, Lightning beat Devils 4-0
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 29 saves for his 36th career shutout to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the New Jersey Devils 4-0 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Netflix experiences streaming delays leading up to Tyson-Paul fight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Netflix's first attempt at handling a live sports event did not receive a passing grade. The fight Friday night between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul experienced streaming problems according to many viewers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Vegas, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - William Karlsson scored the go-ahead goal with 1:18 remaining, and the Vegas Golden Knights rallied for a 4-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Friday. “We stuck with it and eventually we got rewarded,” Karlsson said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rodgers plans to return to Jets for 2025 season
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Did you see the parade? The celebration? Missed it? So did I. When New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers said he has every intention of playing in 2025, the announcement was met with a groan.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Bird, Fowles, Pondexter, Beard headline Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025
item.description: WNBA greats Sue Bird, Sylvia Fowles, Cappie Pondexter and Alana Beard headline the Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025 that was announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Where to watch Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight in Bay Area: Bars showing heavyweight bout
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight world champion Mike Tyson is fighting YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul in a professional boxing match on Friday at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Bucs bring back Super Bowl winning safety Mike Edwards
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have bolstered their ailing secondary by claiming Mike Edwards off of waivers from the Tennessee Titans, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mitchell Chaffee's journey to the Tampa Bay Lightning
item.description: Making it to the NHL is a huge accomplishment for forward Mitchell Chaffee, especially as an undrafted player. Not only did he beat the odds, he’s overcome a serious injury.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Chicago Bears reconsider old Michael Reese Hospital site as new stadium location
item.description: Chicago Bears are reconsidering the Michael Reese Hospital site as a possible location for a new stadium, as they seek larger private investment and political support for the project.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU ranked 6th in College Football Playoff poll
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AB4 Sports) - It was one of the most thrilling victories in BYU history, and will go down as a true rivalry classic. But perhaps what was even more thrilling for the Cougars than their 22-21 win over Utah Saturday night, was the reception they received late Saturday night in Provo.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs' Rachaad White celebrates local students’ completion of financial literacy program
item.description: Financial education at an early age can help young people lower debt and increase savings and credit scores as they mature into adulthood, according to the FDIC.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lightning hosts 7th annual Coops Catch for Kids
item.description: Tampa Bay Lightning Head Coach Jon Cooper hosted the 7th annual Coop’s Catch for Kids, presented by Heritage Insurance, on Monday.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks at team's frustrating record entering the bye week
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have reached their bye week, banged up, two games under the .500 mark, and trailing in a division race that may require the Bucs to be perfect for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC
